results.title: Hawaii Children’s Theatre announces summer lineup
results.description: LIHUE — The Hawaii Children’s Theatre announced on Tuesday its summer lineup of performances that feature talented youth performers, alumni artists and emerging theatre professionals. The post Hawaii Children’s Theatre announces summer lineup appeared first on The Garden Island .

results.title: U mad, bro?: Fans call for Paul Skenes trade, get extreme about Nick Herbig contract
results.description: For a quiet week in the middle of June, there was certainly a ton of material for “U mad, bro?”

results.title: For First Time, US Is Getting More Of Its Electricity From Solar Than Coal
results.description: Solar provides more than twice the share of electricity it did five years ago.

results.title: Ranching Could Soon Come To An End On Moloka‘i. Paniolo Blame TB Testing
results.description: Quarantine rules to prevent bovine tuberculosis are crippling the industry — and a way of life — on rural Hawai‘i island.
